content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The coach reaches for AoA-style moves rather than advice, and the early sequence is promising: T2 surfaces the felt sense via a future-projection question, T4 drops into the body, T6 names a micro-signal (the glance away). But when the client repeatedly returns 'fine' and 'nothing,' the coach does not stay with the texture of 'fine' — the exact move the situation calls for. Instead the coach pivots to cognitive/meaning-making territory (T8 'smallest thing with a charge,' T10 'what would it mean,' T12 'what if it lands perfectly and people don't get it'), which is a story/stakes line of inquiry rather than a numbness-layer exploration. This skips the step: the client said 'fine' and 'relaxed' and the coach never asked what 'fine' actually feels like, what relaxed has as a texture. T14 is a partial recovery — the coach catches the 'hand goes through it' phenomenology and invites sitting with it — but it arrives late and is framed around frustration rather than the numbness itself. Moves are AoA-flavored and timing is not egregious, but the central required move (stay with 'fine' until it has a quality) is missed and the coach hunts for charge/fear-content instead.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Good opening move: future-projection to surface felt sense without arguing the fearlessness frame."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Body drop at the right moment — exactly the golden-path move after the client said 'fine.'"},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names a micro-signal (the glance) — an AoA noticing move, well-timed."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Pivots to 'smallest thing with a charge' — abandons the body/'fine' texture and goes hunting for content. This is the moment to ask what 'fine' actually feels like."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Moves further into meaning/stakes ('what would it mean'), which is a story-layer move while the felt layer hasn't landed."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Hypothetical scenario continues the cognitive hunt; coach is reaching for fear-content rather than staying with numbness."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Partial recovery — picks up the 'hand goes through it' phenomenology and invites sitting with it. Right kind of move, somewhat late."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["meet-resistance-with-okay", "the-happiness-filter", "disassociating-in-the-coaching-room", "disassociation-as-numbness-layer", "how-is-my-anxiety-right-now"],
  "notes": "The coach avoided the worst traps (didn't argue, didn't teach, didn't diagnose dissociation), but the central required move — staying with the texture of 'fine' until it became felt — was missed in favor of hunting for charge in content."
}
